requirements.summary: Diagnose and resolve deployment error - frontend aspects
acceptanceCriteria: Application deploys successfully to the Internet Computer network
No deployment errors are reported during the build process
All existing features remain functional after deployment

file_operations.description: Review and verify all component imports are correct and no circular dependencies exist that could cause build failures
Verify QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider are properly configured and no runtime initialization errors occur during deployment
Ensure all asset paths and meta tags are properly configured for production deployment

requirements.summary: Verify static assets are properly configured and accessible
acceptanceCriteria: Generated planner preview images load correctly in the PreviewSection
iPad mockup image displays properly in the HeroSection
No 404 errors for static assets in browser console

file_operations.description: Verify image src paths reference the correct workspace locations: frontend/public/assets/generated/weekly-layout-preview.dim_600x800.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/daily-layout-preview.dim_600x800.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/habit-tracker-preview.dim_600x800.png. Ensure all image elements have proper alt text and loading attributes

Verify the iPad mockup image src path references the correct workspace location: frontend/public/assets/generated/ipad-mockup.dim_800x600.png. Ensure the image element has proper alt text and loading attributes
Verify the check icon image src path references the correct workspace location: frontend/public/assets/generated/check-icon.dim_48x48.png. Ensure all check icon elements have proper alt text
